scripts.dev: npx concurrently -k -n "frontend,backend" -c "cyan,green" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "cd backend && venv\Scripts\python.exe -m app.main"
scripts.dev:tauri: npx concurrently -k -n "frontend,backend" -c "cyan,green" "npm run tauri dev --prefix frontend" "cd backend && venv\Scripts\python.exe -m app.main"
